family.stripHint: Tap a member to view and manage their info
family.stripEmpty: No family members yet. Tap "Add member" to start.
family.saveFail: Couldn't save, please try again later
family.deleteFail: Couldn't delete, please try again later
family.confirmDeletePerson: Delete {{name}}? Identity samples and profile will be removed and cannot be recovered.
family.enrollLongVideoHint: Longer videos may take a few to tens of seconds
family.noPersonVideo: No person detected, please use a clearer video
family.noPersonImage: No person detected, please use clearer photos
family.noPersonRecord: No clear person detected, please adjust your pose and record again
family.capWithExisting: Up to {{max}} {{label}} samples: {{existing}} already stored, you can pick {{cap}} more this time
family.minBodyWithExisting: Body needs at least {{min}} samples ({{existing}} already stored)
family.minFaceWithExisting: Face needs at least {{min}} samples ({{existing}} already stored)
family.savePartialFail: {{failed}} samples exceeded the limit and were not saved (saved this time: body {{body}} / face {{face}})
family.sourceHint: Recognizing this person needs a few samples in different poses. Pick any one of the following:
family.sourceCameraHint: Face the camera, turn around, walk and look at the lens for about 15 seconds
family.sourceVideoHint: Record a ~15s video on your phone and upload it
family.sourcePhotoHint: 3 or more recommended, with front / side / looking-down and other poses
family.groupFull: {{label}} (already full with {{max}}, no need to pick more)
family.pickerCapHint: Up to {{max}} each for body and face (including enrolled); at least {{min}} per type, with 1 front view, poses as varied as possible
family.pickerAutoHint: Auto-selected by the system, adjust manually before saving
family.noSamplesExtracted: No samples extracted, please change the video or upload more photos
family.operationFail: Couldn't complete the action, please try again later
family.knowledgeHint: What miloco already remembers about your home, tap to view or edit
family.knowledgeEmptyHint: Family memory / area / device info will be gathered here
family.profileEmptyHint: The system records daily habits and preferences automatically; you can also add profile info manually
family.candidateHint: Info observed from daily life, recorded to the home profile only after you confirm
family.taskHint: Ongoing tasks Miloco created for your home — view progress, pause or remove
family.taskEmptyHint: Tasks Miloco creates for you will show up here
family.taskConfirmDeleteMessage: Delete "{{desc}}"? The task and its rules and records will be removed and cannot be recovered.
